name: AI Meeting Assistant
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure AI Speech
services.purpose: Real-time and batch speech-to-text transcription with speaker diarization, language detection, and punctuation restoration

enterprise.note: ~1000 hrs STT/month, custom speech models, batch transcription

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for meeting summarization, action item extraction, decision logging, follow-up email drafting, and topic segmentation

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput for real-time meeting intelligence

services.name: Microsoft Graph API
services.purpose: Calendar integration, Teams meeting metadata, attendee resolution, Outlook task/email creation for action items

dev.note: Included with M365 license, dev tenant

prod.note: Included with M365 license, throttled per-tenant

enterprise.note: Included with M365 license, metered connectors if needed

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Meeting assistant runtime — transcription orchestration, AI pipeline, real-time WebSocket handling, Graph API integration

services.name: Azure Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Meeting transcripts, summaries, action items, decision logs, attendee profiles, and meeting analytics

services.name: Blob Storage
services.purpose: Meeting audio recordings, transcript archives, generated reports, and exported summaries

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: OpenAI API keys, Speech service credentials, Graph API client secrets, encryption keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Meeting pipeline metrics — transcription accuracy, summarization latency, action item extraction rates, API performance

optimization_tips: Use batch transcription for recorded meetings instead of real-time STT — batch mode is 50% cheaper per audio hour and handles large files better
Use GPT-4o-mini for action item extraction and simple summaries — reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-topic segmentation and decision analysis
Implement transcript chunking by speaker turn — reduces token consumption by avoiding redundant context in long meetings
Cache attendee profile data from Microsoft Graph with a 24-hour TTL — avoids repeated API calls for recurring meeting participants
Move meeting audio recordings to Cool storage after 30 days — most recordings are only replayed within the first week
Use Azure AI Speech batch mode during off-peak hours for processing recorded meetings — saves on Container Apps compute by avoiding real-time processing
